'''Mirx''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

An inaugural officer of the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Battle Group]], [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] Mirx was placed in command of [[Task Force Copperleaf]]. When the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] required increased New Republic forces in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], Mirx was also given the command of [[Task Force Gemstone]] from the [[New Republic Third Fleet|Third Battle Group]]. Together, Copperleaf and Gemstone formed the flag task force of [[Operation Strong Hand]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
